reasoning: Emotional (60%): Warm golden/orange palette with cyan gem accent reads as bright and adventurous — not grim. Saturation is appropriate for Hyrule mood. However the silhouette is a conventional straight-edged sword shape without the round friendly curves expected from Echoes of Wisdom toy-diorama aesthetic. Charm factor is adequate but not strong. Score ~6/10. Technical (40%): 1px hard outlines are clearly present at all zoom levels. Shading uses 2-3 hard tones (bright highlight, warm mid, shadow) with no anti-aliasing. Pixels are grid-snapped and hand-pixeled. Matches Denzi-category technique well — clean, readable at small size. Score ~7/10. Weighted: 0.6×6 + 0.4×7 = 6.4 → marginal. Primary gap is emotional: the design needs more personality/roundness to feel like a Zelda toy rather than a generic RPG sword sprite.
